prerequisites.value: Base attack bonus +1, any good alignment

description.value:
**Benefit:** You do not take a penalty to AC while charging undead creatures and evil outsiders.

**Normal:** When you charge, you take a â2 penalty to AC until the start of your next turn. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: When charging any creature with an evil alignment, you can spend 2 stamina points in order to ignore the â2 penalty to AC imposed by charging.
